phase1.task_description:
Add support for latest /branding endpoints
There are additional endpoints available for **Branding**, `/api/v2/branding/themes` and they are not available in the latest version (4.0.0): 

[Branding/get_default_branding_theme](https://auth0.com/docs/api/management/v2#!/Branding/get_default_branding_theme)

[Branding/get_branding_theme](https://auth0.com/docs/api/management/v2#!/Branding/get_branding_theme)
[Branding/patch_branding_theme](https://auth0.com/docs/api/management/v2#!/Branding/pa

llm_reflection_error.explanation: The agent incorrectly assumes that the plan is complete after opening the file, without further action to add the new endpoint support.

llm_action_error.explanation: The agent incorrectly assumes that opening the file will automatically add the new endpoint support, rather than taking further actions to implement the changes.

llm_planning_error.explanation: The agent plans to add a method that does not match the provided endpoint documentation and is not logically consistent with the existing code structure.

llm_action_error.explanation: The agent attempts to edit the `get_branding_theme` method in the wrong file, as it should be added to the `Branding` class rather than replacing an existing method.

llm_reflection_error.explanation: The agent incorrectly assessed that the command execution timed out due to submitting too many changes at once, when in fact it was likely a result of an inefficient plan or syntax error.

llm_action_error.explanation: The agent's action contains a syntax error in the indentation of the `get_branding_theme` method, which is not properly aligned with the rest of the class definition.

phase1_regex_view.task_description:
Add support for latest /branding endpoints
There are additional endpoints available for **Branding**, `/api/v2/branding/themes` and they are not available in the latest version (4.0.0): 

[Branding/get_default_branding_theme](https://auth0.com/docs/api/management/v2#!/Branding/get_default_branding_theme)

[Branding/get_branding_theme](https://auth0.com/docs/api/management/v2#!/Branding/get_branding_theme)
[Branding/patch_branding_theme](https://auth0.com/docs/api/management/v2#!/Branding/pa
